title: Our Love Story

chapters.title: Across the Miles
chapters.text:
They say distance makes the heart grow fonder, and our story is proof of that.

What started as a simple conversation soon became something neither of us expected. Despite being thousands of miles apart—one in the United Kingdom and the other in the Philippines—we found comfort, laughter, and love in each other.

chapters.title: Building Beyond Borders
chapters.text: Through different time zones, late-night calls, endless messages, and countless video chats, we built a relationship that went beyond borders. We celebrated milestones through screens, comforted each other during difficult days, and learned that true love isn't measured by the distance between two places, but by the connection between two hearts.

chapters.title: Choosing Each Other
chapters.text:
The miles tested our patience, strengthened our trust, and deepened our commitment. Every goodbye at the end of a call became a promise that one day, we would no longer have to say goodbye.

After years of choosing each other every day, across oceans and time zones, that day has finally come.

chapters.title: A New Chapter
chapters.text:
With grateful hearts and endless love, we are excited to begin the next chapter of our journey—not as two people living in different countries, but as husband and wife, building one life together.

We warmly invite you to join us as we celebrate the love that brought us together, the distance that made us stronger, and the future we are about to share.

chapters.title: Written by Faith
chapters.text: Because some love stories aren't limited by miles—they are written by faith, patience, and the unwavering belief that true love always finds its way home.

content:
They say distance makes the heart grow fonder, and our story is proof of that.

What started as a simple conversation soon became something neither of us expected. Despite being thousands of miles apart—one in the United Kingdom and the other in the Philippines—we found comfort, laughter, and love in each other.

Through different time zones, late-night calls, endless messages, and countless video chats, we built a relationship that went beyond borders. We celebrated milestones through screens, comforted each other during difficult days, and learned that true love isn't measured by the distance between two places, but by the connection between two hearts.

The miles tested our patience, strengthened our trust, and deepened our commitment. Every goodbye at the end of a call became a promise that one day, we would no longer have to say goodbye.

After years of choosing each other every day, across oceans and time zones, that day has finally come.

With grateful hearts and endless love, we are excited to begin the next chapter of our journey—not as two people living in different countries, but as husband and wife, building one life together.

We warmly invite you to join us as we celebrate the love that brought us together, the distance that made us stronger, and the future we are about to share.

Because some love stories aren't limited by miles—they are written by faith, patience, and the unwavering belief that true love always finds its way home.
